history.text: The Union of Utrecht united rebellious Dutch provinces tied the territory into a wider political structure.
The Act of Abjuration rejected Spanish rule placed the territory under outside administration.
The Peace of Munster recognized Dutch independence.
The Kingdom of the Netherlands was established ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The Netherlands became a founding member of the European Economic Community.

worthSeeing.title: Amsterdam:
worthSeeing.text: Canal ring UNESCO, Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum and Rijksmuseum.

worthSeeing.title: Cycling Nation:
worthSeeing.text: Flat terrain and 35,000 km of bike paths make it the world's cycling capital.

worthSeeing.title: Tulip Fields:
worthSeeing.text: Keukenhof gardens bloom each April with 7 million flowers across 32 hectares.
